items.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
items.title_zh: Nvidia选购Unitree成为人形机器人平台
items.summary: 美国芯片巨头Nvidia将中国人形机器人制造商Unitree纳入首批向研究机构出售的机器人系统。系统集成了Unitree的6英尺高人形机器人与Nvidia的Jetson Thor硬件，支持高性能AI芯片。该合作强化了Nvidia在机器人领域的布局，并引发投资者关注。
important_points: Nvidia选择中国人形机器人企业Unitree作为首个机器人系统合作对象
系统融合了先进的AI芯片和硬件，提升测试能力
投资者预期“物理AI”市场规模可达数万亿美元
公司计划通过IPO扩大市场影响力

items.title: Nvidia-backed $5 billion AI company tells CNBC it's launching major expansion in London
items.title_zh: Nvidia支持的5亿美元AI公司告诉CNBC，正在加大伦敦扩张力
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：American AI company Runway is planning a major expansion in London, CNBC has learned, following in the wake of Anthropic and OpenAI as U.S.；tech companies increasingly look to tap into commercial and talent opportunities in the city.；Runway, which is building world models, on Monday exclusively told CNBC that the company plans to make London its new European headquarters and will invest more than $200 million into the U.K.'s AI ecosystem by the end of 2028.
important_points: American AI company Runway is planning a major expansion in London, CNBC has learned, following in the wake of Anthropic and OpenAI as U.S.
tech companies increasingly look to tap into commercial and talent opportunities in the city.

Runway, which is building world models, on Monday exclusively told CNBC that the company plans to make London its new European headquarters and will invest more than $200 million into the U.K.'s AI ecosystem by the end of 2028.

items.title: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
items.title_zh: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Nvidia has emerged as the world's most valuable company by dominating the market for AI chips in the data center.；Now the company is expanding its prowess to chips that will serve as the main processor for personal computers, entering an arena that's long been ruled by Intel, Advanced Micro Devices, Qualcomm and Apple.；During a keynote address at Taiwan's Computex conference on Monday, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a new N1X processor made alongside Microsoft.
important_points: Nvidia has emerged as the world's most valuable company by dominating the market for AI chips in the data center.

Now the company is expanding its prowess to chips that will serve as the main processor for personal computers, entering an arena that's long been ruled by Intel, Advanced Micro Devices, Qualcomm and Apple.
During a keynote address at Taiwan's Computex conference on Monday, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a new N1X processor made alongside Microsoft.

items.summary: 公司发布了2026年第一季度财报，收入达1.025亿美元，主要来自比特币挖矿。净亏损约261.1亿美元，主要原因是非现金损失和流动性变化。运营哈希率维持在合理水平，成本控制表现优异。
important_points: 第一季度收入接近100亿美元，依赖比特币挖矿业务。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway makes $6.8 billion housing bet with Taylor Morrison deal
items.title_zh: 伯克希菲尔德入驻房地产巨头Taylor Morrison
items.summary: 伯克希菲尔德与泰勒·莫里森达成6.8亿美元交易，强化其对美国住房市场的布局。该交易提升了公司对房地产市场的信心，预计将在2026年下半年完成。尽管利率上升带来挑战，但公司认为住房需求有回升潜力。该动作标志着沃伦·巴菲特继任者格雷格·阿贝尔的战略转型。
important_points: 伯克希菲尔德以高收益入驻房地产项目
交易价格高于同期，体现市场信心
公司战略转型，强化核心业务

items.title: Japanese bond yields are the highest in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from PM Takaichi have markets nervous
items.title_zh: 日本债券收益率创40年高，市场波动加剧
items.summary: 日本债券收益率达到历史高点，反映市场对通胀和经济增长的担忧。政府预算与市场预期基本一致，但债务增加引发疑虑。专家指出，10年期债券收益率上升至2.809%，显示财政与通胀压力并存。
important_points: 日本首相塔卡伊奇提出新预算，支持居民生活成本。
债务增加引发市场不确定性，投资者警惕。
10年期债券收益率跃升至4%以上，反映通胀焦虑。

items.summary: 市场情绪终于转向正面，四家公司表现亮眼，数据显示投资机会增加。分析显示公司估值可能上升，机构投资者信心增强。整体趋势向积极方向发展。
important_points: 市场情绪逐步改善，投资者信心提升。
关键数据显示潜在收益增加。
分析指出公司估值可能上升。
机构对未来表现持积极看法。

items.title: The stock index you invest in isn’t always the most important decision. Here’s what matters even more.
items.title_zh: 投资股市指数时，关键在于时间而非指数选择
items.summary: 这篇文章强调市场时间的重要性，指出道指历史表现证明选择指数并不总是最关键。数据显示投资者应关注时间因素，而非短期表现。市场趋势表明，长期视角更具价值。
important_points: 市场时间比指数选择更关键
道指130年历史验证策略
数据支持长期视角
投资者需关注趋势

items.title: U.S. and Iran still without deal to end war after Trump says he's not in a 'hurry'
items.title_zh: U.S. and Iran still without deal to end war after Trump says he's not in a 'hurry'
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The U.S.；and Iran have yet to ink an agreement to end the war that has dragged on into its fourth month, with President Donald Trump saying Saturday that he is in "no hurry" to make a deal.；Trump, in an interview with his daughter-in-law, Lara Trump, on Fox News, said that he is pressing for a deal that would ensure Iran never acquires a nuclear weapon.
important_points: The U.S.
and Iran have yet to ink an agreement to end the war that has dragged on into its fourth month, with President Donald Trump saying Saturday that he is in "no hurry" to make a deal.
Trump, in an interview with his daughter-in-law, Lara Trump, on Fox News, said that he is pressing for a deal that would ensure Iran never acquires a nuclear weapon.

items.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
items.title_zh: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Jes Staley, the former JPMorgan Chase executive and ex-Barclays CEO, has agreed to be interviewed on about his relationship with notorious sex offender Jeffrey Epstein on July 23 by the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee, a spokesman for the panel confirmed Sunday.；The Financial Times first reported that Staley accepted the invitation for a voluntary transcribed interview extended to him three weeks ago by Oversight Chairman Rep.；James Comer, R-Ky.
important_points: Jes Staley, the former JPMorgan Chase executive and ex-Barclays CEO, has agreed to be interviewed on about his relationship with notorious sex offender Jeffrey Epstein on July 23 by the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee, a spokesman for the panel confirmed Sunday.
The Financial Times first reported that Staley accepted the invitation for a voluntary transcribed interview extended to him three weeks ago by Oversight Chairman Rep.
James Comer, R-Ky.

items.title: In deeply red Oklahoma, minimum wage’s biggest 2026 election cycle fight is about to be decided
items.title_zh: 俄克拉荷马最低工资的2026年选举周期即将决定
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Efforts to raise the minimum wage have been a winner across U.S.；states in recent years, with popular support from voters across both political parties.；Right now, it's a deeply red state that is in the throes of a heated battle over the issue, and it's heading to the polls in less than a month as part of midterm elections primary season.
important_points: Efforts to raise the minimum wage have been a winner across U.S.
states in recent years, with popular support from voters across both political parties.
Right now, it's a deeply red state that is in the throes of a heated battle over the issue, and it's heading to the polls in less than a month as part of midterm elections primary season.
